title: Wake Forest Kitchen Reno — Home
body: Project overview for the Wake Forest kitchen renovation. Plans and cabinet specs are in Box. Schedule, subs and punch list linked below.

title: Schedule and Milestones
body: Demolition mid-December. Rough-in and drywall through early January. Cabinets and trim mid-to-late January. Tile February. Finish and punch list March.

title: Subcontractors and Contacts
body: Carpentry and trim: Jordan McDaniel (Ridgeline). Drywall: Carlos Mendez. Tile: Tonya Reese. GC: Paul Hensley.

title: Job Site Notes
body: Running notes from the site. Cabinet delivery arrived Jan 14. Uppers hung Jan 16-19. Window casing week of Jan 26. Crown molding early February. Sand and finish following tile.

title: Punch List
body: Open items for final walkthrough. Crown corner near fridge caulk and touch up (Jordan, done). Cabinet door adjust on lower left. Grout haze on backsplash. Toe kick trim.

title: Cabinet Specs and Measurements
body: Shaker style, painted white. Upper run 96 inch, lowers 132 inch. Island 42 by 84. Full measurements and cut list in Box. Jordan confirmed rough openings before order.

title: Material and Hardwood List
body: Poplar for painted trim, red oak for the open shelf brackets. Hardwood from The Hardwood Store of NC. Casing and base ordered through Capitol City Lumber.

title: Demolition Notes
body: Old cabinets and soffit out mid-December during demolition. Found a bad joist bay over the sink, flagged to Paul. Plumbing rough by David's referral held to schedule.

title: Trim and Crown Details
body: Crown is a two-piece build-up to match the client's living room. Casing 3.5 inch with backband. Coped inside corners, no miters on long walls. Set nails and fill before paint.

title: Client Change Requests
body: Client added a matching pantry cabinet and asked for open shelving on the window wall. Priced by Paul. Jordan to build shelf brackets from red oak.

title: Finish Walkthrough Photos
body: Final photos of the completed kitchen linked from Box. Uppers, island, crown and open shelving. Client signed off March 23.

title: Tools On Site Checklist
body: Track saw, miter saw and stand, brad and finish nailers, level set, and the No. 4 for hand tuning. Dust collection tied into the shop vac. Jordan owns most, Ridgeline covers the big stuff.

title: Hensley Construction — Home
body: Company standards, safety checklists and preferred vendors.

title: Finish Carpentry Standards
body: Reveal and margin standards for trim, casing and crown. Caulk and fill before paint. Nail hole spacing and set depth.

title: Site Safety Checklist
body: Eye and ear protection on all cutting. Cords off walkways. Fire extinguisher on site. First aid kit in the truck. Ladder and scaffold checks before use.

title: Preferred Vendors
body: Lumber and hardwood: Capitol City Lumber, The Hardwood Store of NC. Hardware: Klingspor's Woodworking Shop. Fasteners and adhesives: local supply. Jordan added notes on hardwood grading.

title: Measuring and Cut List Template
body: Standard format for door and window rough openings, trim runs and cut lists. Measure twice, note grain direction on hardwood pieces.

title: Paint and Finish Guide
body: Prime and two coats on trim. Sand between coats. Wipe stain and topcoat for hardwood accents. Let the tile cure before final caulk on adjacent trim.

title: Apex Deck Build — Home
body: New deck build in Apex. Framing, decking and railing scope. Jordan running trim and rail detail. Materials and permit notes linked below.

title: Deck Framing and Materials
body: Pressure treated framing, composite decking, cedar rail cap. Footings inspected. Ledger flashed and lagged per code. Jordan handling the rail post detail.
